metadata.description: Multi-agent harness: dev pipeline, code review, frontend experts, backend experts, codebase exploration

plugins.name: dev-pipeline
plugins.description: Full feature development pipeline: planner -> FE+BE parallel -> reviewer -> QA

plugins.name: review-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-stage code review: 3 parallel screeners -> moderator -> judge with SARIF output

plugins.name: fe-experts
plugins.description: Frontend expert pool: architect, implementer, styler, perf, tester for React/Next.js

plugins.name: be-experts
plugins.description: Backend expert pool: architect, implementer, validator, resilience, provider, tester for Hono/Express

plugins.name: explore-team
plugins.description: Hierarchical codebase exploration: scout(opus) -> hypothesizer -> evidence -> synthesizer
